reviews.review_msg: Lots of memorization needed, but James answers all your questions in lab and is happy to provide help in office hours as well!
absolutely no remorse when grading your paper

EASC310W "Paleontology" is NOT about dinosaurs. It's about microfossils and worms. The tests are very comprehensive, James is a very harsh grader and provides detailed feedback on writing assignments. The class would fail if it weren't for the TAs grading lab and lecture exams. He is a tough grader and expects you to know everything.

He goes through material quickly, won't provide the powerpoints he uses, cancelled the review session for the lab final, and blamed the midterm average (49%) on "everyone not studying". He doesn't teach so much as talk at you and some of the minor details that you don't have time to write down will be tested. I don't recommend this class or prof.
